item.title: Oitnlaughter Projecting Finger Light Toys Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Battery Ingestion; Violate Mandatory Standard for Toys; Sold on Amazon by Delightmi
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from July 2025 through April 2026 for about $14.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from July 2025 through April 2026 for about $14.
item.summary: This recall involves Oitnlaughter-branded LED Finger Lights. They were sold in sets of 36 multi-colored lights. Each finger light has three internal button cell batteries that power projections of the six animal designs (tiger, elephant, rabbit, panda, butterfly and duck) when the finger light is activated.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Oitnlaughter LED Finger Lights.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled toys immediately, take them away from children and contact Delightmi for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to properly dispose of the finger lights into the trash and send a photo of the disposed product to delightmi@outlook.com Note: Button cell batteries are hazardous. Batteries should be disposed of or recycled by following local hazardous waste procedure.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
